note: Role library = build-DAG nodes of agentic-delivery-pipeline deliverable. Scanned from prompts/ (built skeleton). One role = one prompt (D1) — EXCEPT emitter_owned roles (D26/D27): Tier-1 whole-mechanical role whose artifact owned end-to-end by tools/det/emit/*.mjs, prompt retired, role identity survives via sentinel + emitter_owned entry (no .md at unit_path). 45 roles, 2 emitter-owned. STREAM-MANAGER = operating-model helper (D28/CR-007): not a stochastic role, no prompt file — logic lives inline in orchestrator STEP 0.0 + STEP 0.1 + new-stream dispatch; _streams/ tree is the durable registry. LEDGER-PRUNE = operating-model helper (D31/CR-010): not a stochastic role, det-tool-backed (tools/det/prune-ledger.mjs), no prompt file — prunes merged-wave records from the informational reranker ledger at STEP 0.1 after reconcile. LENS-DEFINE = audit-class interactive intake role (D36/CR-015): collects Operator-defined lens definitions + scope; writes .audit/lenses.json + .audit/scope.json; dispatched by CLASSIFIER when class=audit. AUDIT-RUN = audit-class silent auditor role (D36/CR-015): reads lenses + scope; evaluates every criterion per in-scope file; writes .audit/audit-report.json; dispatched after LENS-DEFINE. AUDIT-REPORT = audit-class silent report writer role (D36/CR-015, trimmed D37/CR-017 §A): reads audit-report.json; writes .audit/report.md only; dispatched after AUDIT-RUN. AUDIT-PROMOTE = audit-class silent intake writer role (D37/CR-017 §B): reads audit-report.json; writes .aprd/00-raw-request.md shaped as ADP intake; invoked optionally after AUDIT-REPORT. BUGFIX-LOCALIZE = bugfix-class Phase-0 intake role (D37/CR-018): reproduce → localize → root-cause a reported defect; writes .aprd/diagnosis.json; root_cause.cause carried VERBATIM by SYNTHESIZE (H10); extracted from DIAGNOSE Part C (SRP split). SEQUENCE-FEATURE-ADD = feature-add sequencer, Phase 1 (D37/CR-019): orders new feature slices into 08-rerank.json remaining_sequence[], pins completed[] baseline, hands off to RE-RANK. Extracted from SEQUENCE by SRP split (CR-019).

inline_orchestrator.note: Operating-model helper (D28/D29). Not a stochastic island — logic is mechanical git + file writes (branch check, merge, brief write). Implemented inline in orchestrator STEP 0.0 (enforce-non-master R-MW-3; branch-match R-MW-5, D29 Option-B Cases A–E), STEP 0.1 (auto-reconcile, R-MW-2), and new-stream dispatch path (R-MW-4). No prompt file. Durable workstream registry = _streams/<slug>/brief.md; branch: field is authoritative binding (R-MW-5, D29). Precondition guard: branch in registered-pending-set OR (master + <=1 pending auto-checkout) AND reconcile_from_main clean | HALT (see contracts.json step-0-precondition).

Operating-model helper (D31). Not a stochastic island — logic is mechanical git read + JSON surgery (detect merged via git cat-file -e master:<done_sentinel>, drop merged completed[] rows + mirror, collapse _note). Det-tool-backed: pure pruneLedger(ledger, mergedSentinels) + git-backed CLI in tools/det/prune-ledger.mjs. Invoked inline at orchestrator STEP 0.1 after auto-reconcile. Prunes merged-only (R-LH-1); preserves remaining_sequence + open deferred_findings (R-LH-2); idempotent (R-LH-3). Ledger is informational ordering, not the disk-derived frontier (D20). Both-directions selftest: tools/det/prune-ledger.selftest.mjs vs _fixtures/ledger-prune/. Postcondition: contracts.json step-0.1-ledger-prune.

emitter_owned.note: Tier-1 whole-mechanical (D26). Prompt retired W5/CR-002 (D27); artifact owned end-to-end by emitter (id high-water scan + seam catalog + oracle inventory + lock digest, deterministic). Role identity survives via sentinel + this entry (D1). Both-directions selftest: tools/det/emit/baseline-map.selftest.mjs.

Tier-1 whole-mechanical (D26). Prompt retired W5/CR-002 (D27); artifact owned end-to-end by emitter (DAG-filter to build_set + real|mocked membership + coverage, deterministic, both modes). Role identity survives via sentinel + this entry (D1). Both-directions selftest: tools/det/emit/build-plan.selftest.mjs.
